preview_text:
Now is the time for all good men to come to the aid of their country. Fascism has taken hold in the U.S., and as always happens with authoritarian white-supremacist regimes, people are starting to die, and policies are being put in place that will result in more suffering and more death.

Immigrants best represent the spirit of the American Way.

Trans Rights are Human Rights.

Sphinx of Black Quartz, Judge my Vow!
